name: Lanikai Pillbox
tagline: Two WWII bunkers over the Mokulua Islands — the most photogenic sunrise hike on the windward side.
parking: Street parking on Kaelepulu Dr — arrive before sunrise to find a spot
hours: Sunrise to sunset (no gates; unofficial trail on public land)
bestTime: Sunrise — start 30 min before for the climb; the light over the Mokes is unbeatable
insiderTips: The trailhead is at the end of Kaelepulu Dr behind a chain-link fence — look for the worn path. About 20-25 min to the first pillbox. The second pillbox is 10 min further with even better views. Trail is steep and rocky in spots — wear proper shoes, not slippers. After the hike, walk down to Lanikai Beach for a swim.
